Title: Notice of Public Meeting - Planning Board
Summary / Content: Notice of Public Meeting - Planning Board BURKE COUNTY PLANNING BOARD PUBLIC NOTICE The Burke County Planning Board will hold a public meeting at 5:30 p.m. on August 27, 2026, in the Commissioners’ Meeting Room/County Services Building, 110 N. Green St. in Morganton, NC (Door E) regarding the following zoning-related matter: ZTA 2026-02: Staff propose amendments to the Burke County Subdivision Ordinance and the Burke County Zoning Ordinance to modify the definition and lot thresholds for minor subdivisions. Citizens may submit written comments and/or concerns regarding this proposed item to: Community@burkenc.org OR Burke County Community Development P.O. Box 219 Morganton, NC 28680 Any written comments must be received by July 21, 2026, at 5:00 PM. Please contact Burke County Community Development at (828) 764-9033 with questions. Title: Notice of Public Hearing - Consideration of Amending Chapter 10
Summary / Content: Notice of Public Hearing - Consideration of Amending Chapter 10 BURKE COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING FEBRUARY 16, 2026 The Burke County Board of Commissioners will hold a public hearing at 6:00 p.m. or as soon as public comments can be heard, on February 16, 2026, in the Commissioners’ Meeting Room, Burke Services Building, 110 N. Green St. in Morganton, NC (Door E) regarding the following matter: Request: Consideration of an Ordinance (2026-01) Amending Chapter 10, Buildings & Building and Minimum Housing of the Burke County Code Description: This amendment establishes the protocols for the Burke County Building Inspections Department. It defines the duties and qualifications of inspectors, outlines the permitting process, and sets procedures for addressing structural deficiencies. Additionally, it codifies minimum housing standards and requirements within the Burke County Code. Questions regarding this item may be directed to the Community Development Department at 828-764-9030. If a reasonable ADA accommodation is needed to participate in the public meeting, please contact the County Manager’s office by February 10, 2026, at 828-764-9350. Public Notices Posted on February 05, 2026

Title: Notice of Public Hearing - ZMA 2025-02
Summary / Content: Notice of Public Hearing - ZMA 2025-02 BURKE COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING FEBRUARY 16, 2026 The Burke County Board of Commissioners will hold a public hearing at 6:00 p.m. or as soon as public comments can be heard, on February 16, 2026, in the Commissioners’ Meeting Room, Burke Services Building, 110 N. Green St. in Morganton, NC (Door E) regarding the following zoning related matter: Zoning Text Amendment - ZTA 2025-02 Applicant: Burke County Community Development Request: To amend Articles 2, 3, 5, 6, and 7 of the Burke County Zoning Ordinance. Description: This staff-initiated amendment increases options for residential accessory structures, establishes new definitions and uses, and streamlines Manufactured Home Park regulations. The amendment reorganizes design standards, updates special community master plans, and review procedures. Questions regarding this item may be directed to the Community Development Department at 828-764-9030. If a reasonable ADA accommodation is needed to participate in the public meeting, please contact the County Manager’s office by February 10, 2026, at 828-764-9350. Public Notices Posted on February 05, 2026 | Last Updated on January 29, 2026
